allow: PowerShell($css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/static/css/style.css" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "CSS | Status: $\($css.StatusCode\) | Size: $\($css.Content.Length\) bytes"; $js = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/static/js/app.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "app.js | Status: $\($js.StatusCode\)"; $js2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/static/js/api.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "api.js | Status: $\($js2.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell(Write-Host "CSS lines:"; \(Get-Content "F:\\Coding\\Go\\toOffer\\Forum\\web\\css\\style.css"\).Count; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "Web file tree:"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "F:\\Coding\\Go\\toOffer\\Forum\\web" | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Length\) bytes  $\($_.FullName.Replace\("F:\\Coding\\Go\\toOffer\\Forum\\web\\", "web/"\)\)" })

PowerShell(try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/signup" -Method POST -Body '{"username":"test","password":"123456"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing } catch { Write-Host "Status:" $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body:" $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/signup" -Method POST -Body '{"username":"test1","password":"123456","email":"t@t.com"}' -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Signup Status:" $res.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $res.Content } catch { Write-Host "Status:" $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; $r = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Body:" $r.ReadToEnd\(\); $r.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"username":"test1","password":"123456","email":"t@t.com"}'; Write-Host "Body:" $body; $resp = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://localhost:8080/api/v1/signup"\); $resp.Method = "POST"; $resp.ContentType = "application/json"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($body\); $resp.GetRequestStream\(\).Write\($bytes, 0, $bytes.Length\); $resp.GetRequestStream\(\).Close\(\); try { $httpResp = $resp.GetResponse\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($httpResp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Status:" $httpResp.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\) } catch [System.Net.WebException] { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Host "Status:" $_.Response.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($t = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/login" -Method POST -Body '{"username":"test1","password":"123456"}' -ContentType "application/json"\).token; $h = @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; $post = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/post/9" -Headers $h; Write-Host "URL: $\($post.video_url\)"; try { $res = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $post.video_url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "GET Status: $\($res.StatusCode\) | Size: $\($res.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($t = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/login" -Method POST -Body '{"username":"test1","password":"123456"}' -ContentType "application/json"\).token; $h = @{Authorization="Bearer $t"}; $pl = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/posts?size=1" -Headers $h; $pId = $pl[0].post.id; Write-Host "Post: $pId"; $u = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/post/$pId" -Method PUT -Body '{"title":"Updated","content":"Updated content"}' -Headers $h -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host "Update: $\($u.msg\)"; $pu = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/post/$pId" -Headers $h; Write-Host "Title: $\($pu.title\) Content: $\($pu.content\)"; $d = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/post/$pId" -Method DELETE -Headers $h; Write-Host "Delete: $\($d.msg\)")
